# Standard Reference Layout — Bento 5 Left 3 Right 2

Reference example for a five-compartment Standard bento layout.

## Box

- External dimensions: 150 x 200 x 100 mm
- Material thickness: 3 mm
- Kerf: 0.1 mm

## Internal layout

- One traversing primary vertical separator
- Two partial secondary horizontal separators on the left zone
- One partial secondary horizontal separator on the right zone
- Result: three stacked compartments on the left and two stacked compartments on the right

## Generated files

- box50-150x200x100-standard-bento-5-left-3-right-2-layout.svg
- box50-150x200x100-standard-bento-5-left-3-right-2-cut.svg
